title: Habenaria helferi
taxonomy: Habenaria helferi is a species of orchid. It is a type of terrestrial orchid belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Habenaria is a part of the tribe Orchideae. The classification of Habenaria helferi includes its placement in the section Habenaria. This section is part of the subgenus Orchidex.

intro: Habenaria helferi, also known as Helfer's Habenaria, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which may help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being.
